title: Garlic Roasted Potato Roast
description: This earthy and juicy potato roast is a crowd-pleaser Dutch dish featuring garlic sauce and perfect for those following the keto diet.

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: Waxy potatoes like Russet are best

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: For the garlic sauce, use 4 cloves for mashed potatoes

instructions: Dice the potatoes and place them in a large bowl.
Add olive oil, salt, black pepper, and minced garlic cloves. Toss well until all potatoes are evenly coated with the mixture.
Transfer the potatoes onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast for 30-40 minutes or until golden brown on top and tender inside.
For the garlic sauce: In a blender, blend minced garlic cloves with fresh cream (dairy-free option if needed), salt, black pepper, and lemon juice to taste. Adjust seasonings according to preference.
